</session_context>

 - Templates/

- Project Hub (id: "ws_1731105000456_2b7d9e1f")
  Description: Work‑related documents, plans, and deliverables
  Root folder: Projects/
</available_workspaces>

<available_agents>
- name: FileManagerAgent
  description: Performs file and folder operations such as create, move, rename, and delete.

- name: KnowledgeCurator
  description: Organizes notes, extracts key ideas, and maintains cross‑note links.

- name: HabitPlanner
  description: Suggests productivity habits, tracks routine workflows, and helps schedule reviews.
</available_agents>
